Tentative plan for Midterm 1 retakes during dead week:
·
Retakes will be computer-based + randomized.
You are only eligible for a retake if you score below the class median on Midterm 1.
To boost your score up to the median, you need to demonstrate mastery on the retake.
.
Tentative definition of mastery: 90% correct. This is a high bar. All or nothing.
Your full retake score will be used in the computation for the 50% exam rule, regardless of
whether you reach the mastery threshold.

Tentative plan for Midterm 1 retakes during dead week:
·
Retakes will be computer-based + randomized.
You are only eligible for a retake if you score below the class median on Midterm 1.
To boost your score up to the median, you need to demonstrate mastery on the retake.
.
Tentative definition of mastery: 90% correct. This is a high bar. All or nothing.
Your full retake score will be used in the computation for the 50% exam rule, regardless of
whether you reach the mastery threshold.
In short: Take your first attempt seriously. Retakes are an insurance policy, not a free do-over.
